SCSK Corporation is a "Global IT Services Company" that provides a wide range of one-stop services from system development to IT infrastructure construction, IT management, BPO, and IT hardware and software sales.
As IT professionals who lead our clients' global business and, by extension, the turbulent world economy, we strongly expect our employees to have a passion for changing the future, always set high goals, and take on challenges with high aspirations.
No matter what difficulties they face, they will overcome them one by one and open up new
